<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve system-level generic credentials"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/system/generic-credentials/{generic-credentials}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve system-level generic credentials by name. Returns a
heavily redacted Kubernetes Secret resource.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
